name: AI Upscaler Plugin
description: AI-powered video upscaling plugin with Docker microservice architecture. Features automated hardware benchmarking, intelligent fallback system, pre-processing cache, and sidebar integration.
overview: Revolutionary AI upscaling plugin with Docker-based AI processing. Eliminates native DLL conflicts.

versions.changelog: v1.6.1.16: Hotfix for #64 — LibraryUpscaleScanTask failed with 'File not found: ffprobe' / 'Cannot start process because a file name has not been provided' because three singletons (VideoAnalyzer, VideoFrameProcessor, ProcessingMethodExecutor) captured empty ffmpeg/ffprobe paths at construction time. New EnsureFFmpegReady() late-resolves and propagates paths via UpdateFFprobePath/UpdateFFmpegPath. README header synced 1.6.1.14 → 1.6.1.16.

v1.6.1.13: In-player quick-menu redesigned with tabs [Models | Filters | Realtime]. New Filters tab adds live CSS video filters (Brightness / Contrast / Saturation sliders + 15 preset looks) that update the <video> element at ~60fps — no re-transcode, no AI service needed. Advanced section persists server-side FFmpeg filter params (Gamma / Sharpness / Color Temperature / Vignette / Film Grain / Denoise) via new POST /Upscaler/filter-config endpoint. LIVE indicator while CSS overlay active. Reset/Save on both tiers.

v1.6.1.12: Bugfix + model-catalog cleanup. Un-breaks 4 models (gfpgan-v1.4, codeformer, rife-v4.6 → rife-v4.9 alias, rife-v4.6-lite → rife-v4.7 alias). Adds rife-v4.8. 5 models without public ONNX mirrors documented in docs/MODEL-HOSTING.md. New Scripts/verify-release.ps1 prevents recurrence of v1.6.1.11 wrong-ZIP-upload bug. Net catalog: 32 available / 5 self-host.

v1.6.1.11: Regex allows dots in model names. 9 broken models flipped to available:false. Fixed 3 silent-401 fetch() calls in player quick-menu. /Upscaler/jobs now requires elevation. SDK pin bumped 10.11.6 → 10.11.8. Bulk-load: 30/30 pass.
v1.5.6.0: RequiresElevation on 8 admin endpoints, per-user rate limiting, Lanczos2 WebGL shader, Test Upscale button, Docker healthcheck, SSRF + semaphore fixes.
v1.5.5.4: 5 new configurable features (Quality Metrics PSNR/SSIM, Face Enhancement GFPGAN, Film Grain Management, Custom ONNX Model Upload, OpenAPI Docs) + dashboard UI + deep security hardening.
v1.5.5.0: Critical bug fixes — circuit breaker, ncnn reshape, audio passthrough, config validation.
v1.5.4.4: Docker deep scan — 20+ functional bug fixes. All 6 Dockerfiles verified.
v1.5.4.3: Fix bench buttons — auto-download models on load, forward Docker error codes, consistent API response format.
v1.5.4.2: Fix CORS errors in model catalog and performance monitor. Add live video benchmark.
v1.5.3.5: RTX 5000 Blackwell (CUDA 12.8) + Apple M5 CoreML support. 6 bugfixes.
v1.5.3.4: New AI models (SPAN, SwinIR, Real-ESRGAN x2+/AnimeVideo), output codec selection, ONNX tiling (OOM fix), 7 critical bugfixes.
v1.5.3.3: Real-time upscaling during playback — two-tier system (WebGL client-side + Server AI). Benchmark-driven tier selection, FPS overlay, auto-fallback.
v1.5.3.2: Fix model selection — correct model is now auto-downloaded, loaded, and used for upscaling.
v1.5.3.1: Scheduled task now pre-upscales videos, GPU fallback fixes (NVIDIA TensorRT skip, Intel OpenVINO diagnostics), improved /gpu-verify endpoint, player menu redesign.
v1.5.3.0: Fix player button injection (multi-path Docker support, config page bootstrap fallback), add Scheduled Task for library scanning, close stale issues.
v1.5.2.9: Fix FFmpeg wrapper 404 (dual route fix), fix benchmark 0.0s when Docker AI service unreachable, fix Test Connection cache, prominent Player Integration section. Fixes #48.
v1.5.2.8: Fix API route mismatch (503 errors on all buttons), config page rebuild (Jellyfin 10.11+), horizontal tabs + collapsible sections, 15+ bug fixes, dark theme. Fixes #39 #36 #48.
v1.5.2.7: Docker fixes (TensorRT/CUDA fallback, Intel OpenVINO GPU, multi-GPU selection), premium sidebar dashboard redesign, player button MutationObserver.
v1.5.2.4: Major update - 30+ bug fixes, security hardening, dashboard redesign with tabs, fixed JS components, correct model names, thread safety fixes.
v1.5.2.3: Fixed NotSupported plugin status — lowered targetAbi to 10.11.0.0 for broad Jellyfin 10.11.x compatibility.
v1.5.2.2: Fixed player button not showing (Issue #45), Intel OpenVINO GPU fix.
v1.5.1.1: SSH configuration hotfix. Fixed SSH fields not saving/loading. Added Test SSH Connection button and backend endpoint.
v1.5.1.0: Real Remote Transcoding (SSH). Implements rffmpeg-style architecture with SSH tunneling, path mapping, and shared transcoding folder support.
v1.5.0.1: Hotfix - Fixed DI error (#34), Checksum fix (#33), Intel GPU/OpenVINO support (#32)
v1.5.0.0: Docker Microservice Architecture - Eliminates native DLL conflicts. AI processing via external Docker container.
v1.4.9.4: Final Release - Settings Page Fix, Cross-Platform Support, Complete DI Registration.
v1.4.9.3: Verified Service Registration and Settings Polish.
v1.4.9.2: Critical Update. Implemented Real AI Upscaling with ONNX Runtime, Fixed Dependency Injection crashes, Added Model Manager, and Hardware Benchmarking.
v1.4.9.1: Fixed sidebar integration and settings access. Dashboard now appears correctly in sidebar with working settings link.
